chunks.title: Wisdom in Speech and Observation
chunks.reason: A series of short proverbs contrasting wise and foolish speech with divine observation.

chunks.title: Wisdom in Daily Conduct
chunks.reason: A collection of proverbs regarding the tongue, discipline, and household wealth.

chunks.title: Wisdom in Heart and Relationships
chunks.reason: Proverbs focusing on the human heart, family dynamics, and emotional states.

chunks.title: Wisdom in Decision and Action
chunks.reason: A sequence of sayings about planning, answers, paths, and social interactions.

chunks.title: The Path to Wisdom
chunks.reason: Concluding verses emphasizing the value of reproof and the fear of Yahweh.
